description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a matte black bezel. The front features a large, high-resolution screen displaying the Windows operating system, with a thin bezel that is slightly wider at the bottom. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, rectangular pedestal stand with a broad, flat base, providing stability. The rear of the monitor is plain and unadorned, with a subtle horizontal indentation near the top, likely for ventilation. The sides of the monitor are slim, emphasizing its modern, space-saving design. No visible buttons, ports, or branding are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A modern, flat-panel computer monitor with a matte black bezel and a rectangular pedestal stand. The display is wide and slim, with a clean, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display screen with a thin black bezel and a flat, rectangular base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the depth of the stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black back panel with a subtle horizontal indentation near the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the thinness of the monitor and the solid base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is matte black, thin on the top and sides, slightly thicker at the bottom, with sharp corners and no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular pedestal stand with a broad, flat base, made of matte black plastic or metal, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
